events.summary: Implementation added speaker labels even though speaker labels were cut from the current Product Spec revision.

links.title: Add transcript search and speaker labels

drift.spec_claim: Speaker labels are listed under scope.cut for this revision.
drift.observed_reality: The implementation branch adds speaker label extraction and displays labels beside transcript lines.

decision.rationale: Speaker labels require separate evals and UI review. They remain outside this release.

linked_artifacts.title: Remove speaker labels from first transcript search release

result.learning: Scope cuts need to be checked before implementation is marked complete.
